modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Users can't log into iMac with USD domain accounts.

full_description_text: So, like, users are trying to log into the iMacs in the lab, right? But they just can't get in with their USD domain accounts. It's kinda frustrating, and I think they were just trying to do some work or something.
short_description: Users can't log into iMac with USD domain accounts.
description: So, like, users are trying to log into the iMacs in the lab, right? But they just can't get in with their USD domain accounts. It's kinda frustrating, and I think they were just trying to do some work or something.
